xsd:element.name: C13
xsd:element.saw-sql:sqlFormula: case when "Showroom"."Enquiry"."Test Ride Flag" is null then 'N' else "Showroom"."Enquiry"."Test Ride Flag" end
xsd:element.saw-sql:displayFormula: CASE WHEN "Enquiry"."Test Ride Flag" IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE "Enquiry"."Test Ride Flag" END

xsd:element.name: C20
xsd:element.saw-sql:sqlFormula: case when "Showroom"."Contact"."Customer First Name" ='Unspecified' then null else "Showroom"."Contact"."Customer First Name" end
xsd:element.saw-sql:displayFormula: CASE WHEN "Contact"."Customer First Name" = 'Unspecified' THEN NULL ELSE "Contact"."Customer First Name" END

xsd:element.name: C21
xsd:element.saw-sql:sqlFormula: case when "Showroom"."Contact"."Customer Last Name" ='Unspecified' then null else "Showroom"."Contact"."Customer Last Name" end
xsd:element.saw-sql:displayFormula: CASE WHEN "Contact"."Customer Last Name" = 'Unspecified' THEN NULL ELSE "Contact"."Customer Last Name" END

xsd:element.name: C22
xsd:element.saw-sql:sqlFormula: case when "Showroom"."Network"."Network Type" <>'Main Dealer' then null else "Showroom"."Contact"."Mobile No." end
xsd:element.saw-sql:displayFormula: CASE WHEN "Network"."Network Type" <> 'Main Dealer' THEN NULL ELSE "Contact"."Mobile No." END

xsd:element.name: C30
xsd:element.saw-sql:sqlFormula: case when "Showroom"."Account"."Account Type" ='Unspecified' then null else "Showroom"."Account"."Account Type" end
xsd:element.saw-sql:displayFormula: CASE WHEN "Account"."Account Type" = 'Unspecified' THEN NULL ELSE "Account"."Account Type" END

xsd:element.name: C31
xsd:element.saw-sql:sqlFormula: case when "Showroom"."Account"."Account Name" ='Unspecified' then null else "Showroom"."Account"."Account Name" end
xsd:element.saw-sql:displayFormula: CASE WHEN "Account"."Account Name" = 'Unspecified' THEN NULL ELSE "Account"."Account Name" END
